mapper.select:
SELECT se.*, s.seat_remaining AS seat_remaining FROM bus_schedule_search se JOIN bus_schedule s ON se.schedule_id = s.schedule_id
AND JSON_CONTAINS(se.start_city, CONCAT('"', #{startCity}, '"'))
AND JSON_CONTAINS(se.end_city, CONCAT('"', #{endCity}, '"'))
AND DATE(se.depart_time) = STR_TO_DATE(#{departDate},'%Y-%m-%d')
AND se.status = 1
ORDER BY se.depart_time ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO bus_schedule_search (schedule_id, line_id, start_city, end_city, depart_time, arrive_time, duration , price, seat_remaining, status) VALUES (#{scheduleId}, #{lineId}, #{startCity}, #{endCity}, #{departTime}, #{arriveTime},#{duration}, #{price}, #{seatRemaining}, #{status})

REPLACE INTO bus_schedule_search (schedule_id, line_id, start_city, end_city, depart_time, arrive_time, price, seat_remaining, status) VALUES (#{scheduleId}, #{lineId}, #{startCity}, #{endCity}, #{departTime}, #{arriveTime}, #{price}, #{seatRemaining}, #{status})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM bus_schedule_search WHERE depart_time < DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 30 DAY)
